The content you've shared (from the image IMG-20260304-WA0001.jpg) is a partial specification table describing the modules and key features of a mobile application built with Flutter, distributed as an APK, and connected to a hosted backend.
This appears to be a custom business application designed for a sales/field team (likely in construction, interior design, home improvement, real estate, or similar industry) that handles customer enquiries → site visits → measurements → quotations → follow-ups.
It has two main user roles:
Admin / Owner (full access)
Staff / Sales / Field team (limited access, focused on execution)
Here's a clean, structured breakdown of what the document is describing:
Overall App Purpose
Mobile-first CRM-like tool for managing sales enquiries (leads)
Core workflow: Create enquiry → Assign to staff → Site visit → Take measurements → Prepare & send quotation (with PDF) → Track status → Follow up
Includes measurement tools specific to area calculations (e.g. flooring, wall cladding, painting, false ceiling, etc.)
Strong focus on secure login, role-based access, status tracking, and PDF quotation generation
Modules Summary (from the table)
S.No
Module Name
Target User
Key Features (cleaned & grouped)
1
Admin Modules (Owner Access – Mobile App)
Owner / Admin
• Secure admin login • Full staff management (CRUD: Create, Read, Update, Delete staff accounts) • Material management (add/maintain list of materials used in quotations) • Enquiry status configuration (define dropdown options like "Initiated", "Site Visited", "Quotation Sent", "Follow-up", "Closed", etc.) • Create & assign new enquiries to staff • View & manage all enquiries company-wide (with assigned staff + full details) • Basic monitoring & reporting on enquiries • Define measurement categories using ENUM/struct for structured data entry • Measurement conversion logic (e.g. convert length × breadth in meters → square feet area) • Dynamic PDF quotation generation (includes calculated totals, material breakdowns, etc.) • Review & monitor progress
2
Staff Modules (Sales/Field Team – Mobile App)
Sales executives / Field staff
• Secure staff login • Create new enquiries (capture customer details + initial quotation info) • Update quotation/enquiry status at different pipeline stages • View & manage only their assigned enquiries • Add stage-wise reviews/comments (progress notes) • Generate status-based reports for their enquiries • Create/upload quotations (with calculations + ability to attach images/photos, e.g. site photos, material samples, sketches)
Likely Business Context / Industry Fit
This kind of app is commonly built for:
Interior designers
Civil contractors / builders
Modular kitchen & wardrobe companies
Flooring / tiling / painting contractors
False ceiling / aluminum partition vendors
Home renovation & turnkey project firms
The emphasis on measurement conversion (meter → sq ft), material lists, image attachments in quotations, and PDF generation strongly points toward quotation-heavy field sales in construction/interiors.
Observations / Possible Incompleteness
The table seems cut off mid-sentence in the Admin module description (ends abruptly at "etc.)").
No mention of customer-facing features (e.g. customer portal, WhatsApp sharing of PDF, payment tracking, etc.) — this is purely internal/staff + owner tool.
No explicit mention of offline support, GPS/site location capture, inventory/stock check, invoicing after quotation acceptance, or integrations (WhatsApp, email, Google Sheets) — these might be in later sections or planned additions.
"ENUMUM" in the text is almost certainly a typo for ENUM (enumeration type for fixed status/category values).
If this is a requirements document / proposal / feature list you're reviewing or building:
It looks reasonably well-structured for a MVP (Minimum Viable Product) of a field sales + quotation app.
Key development focus areas would be: secure auth, role-based access control (RBAC), dynamic PDF generation (likely using pdf package in Flutter + custom templates), measurement math logic, image upload & storage (probably Firebase or your hosted backend), and responsive enquiry listing with filters.

Thank you for sharing this comprehensive breakdown of the mobile application specification. This is a well-structured **Flutter-based field sales & quotation management CRM** with clear role-based access and a defined workflow.

## Key Takeaways

**Core Value Proposition:**
- Streamline the sales pipeline from lead capture → site assessment → quotation generation → follow-up
- Measurement tools built-in for accurate area calculations (crucial for construction/interiors)
- Role-based access ensures staff only see their assigned work while owners retain full oversight

**Critical Technical Components to Develop:**
1. **Authentication & RBAC** — Secure login with role-based routing (Admin vs. Staff dashboards)
2. **Measurement Logic** — Unit conversion engine (meters ↔ sq ft, custom formulas per module)
3. **Dynamic PDF Generation** — Server-side or client-side (Flutter's `pdf` package) with quotation templates
4. **Media Management** — Image upload/storage for site photos, material samples, sketches
5. **Enquiry State Machine** — Status progression with validation rules
6. **Reporting & Filtering** — Staff dashboards (my enquiries), Owner dashboards (all enquiries with staff assignment view)

| **Phase 4: Flutter Frontend** | Days 26-35 | Auth UI, admin & staff dashboards, measurement tools, PDF preview |

### **Day 2-3: Database Schema Design**

#### **PostgreSQL Database Schema**

```sql name=001_init_schema.sql url=https://github.com/yourusername/sales-quotation-backend/blob/main/src/migrations/001_init_schema.sql
-- ========== USERS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  phone VARCHAR(20),
  password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  role ENUM('ADMIN', 'STAFF') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'STAFF',
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  is_deleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  deleted_at TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT email_format CHECK (email ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}$')
);

CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users(email);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_role ON users(role);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_is_deleted ON users(is_deleted);

-- ========== MATERIALS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE materials (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  unit VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- "sq.ft", "meter", "piece", etc.
  base_cost DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_materials_name ON materials(name);
CREATE INDEX idx_materials_is_active ON materials(is_active);

-- ========== ENQUIRY STATUS CONFIG ==========
CREATE TABLE enquiry_status_config (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  status_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  status_value VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  display_order INT NOT NULL,
  color_hex VARCHAR(7),
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_status_is_active ON enquiry_status_config(is_active);

-- ========== ENQUIRIES TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE enquiries (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  enquiry_number VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  customer_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  customer_email VARCHAR(255),
  customer_phone VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  customer_address TEXT,
  assigned_staff_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  status VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INITIATED',
  notes TEXT,
  is_deleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  deleted_at TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (status) REFERENCES enquiry_status_config(status_value)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_number ON enquiries(enquiry_number);
CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_customer_phone ON enquiries(customer_phone);
CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_assigned_staff ON enquiries(assigned_staff_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_status ON enquiries(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_created_at ON enquiries(created_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_is_deleted ON enquiries(is_deleted);

-- ========== MEASUREMENT CATEGORIES ==========
CREATE TABLE measurement_categories (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  category_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, -- "Flooring", "Wall Cladding", "Painting", etc.
  category_key VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  measurement_fields JSONB NOT NULL, -- {"length_unit": "meter", "breadth_unit": "meter", "output_unit": "sq.ft"}
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_categories_is_active ON measurement_categories(is_active);

-- ========== MEASUREMENTS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE measurements (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  enquiry_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES enquiries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  category_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES measurement_categories(id),
  measurement_data JSONB NOT NULL, -- {"length": 10, "breadth": 5, "calculated_area": 50}
  calculated_value DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_measurements_enquiry ON measurements(enquiry_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_measurements_category ON measurements(category_id);

-- ========== QUOTATIONS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE quotations (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  enquiry_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES enquiries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  quotation_number VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  quotation_date DATE NOT NULL,
  valid_until DATE,
  subtotal DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  tax_percentage DECIMAL(5, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  tax_amount DECIMAL(12, 2),
  total_amount DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', -- DRAFT, SENT, ACCEPTED, REJECTED
  pdf_path VARCHAR(500),
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  sent_at TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_quotations_enquiry ON quotations(enquiry_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_quotations_number ON quotations(quotation_number);
CREATE INDEX idx_quotations_status ON quotations(status);

-- ========== QUOTATION LINE ITEMS ==========
CREATE TABLE quotation_items (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  quotation_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES quotations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  material_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES materials(id),
  quantity DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  unit_cost DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  line_total DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_quotation_items_quotation ON quotation_items(quotation_id);

-- ========== ENQUIRY PROGRESS & COMMENTS ==========
CREATE TABLE enquiry_progress (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  enquiry_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES enquiries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  old_status VARCHAR(100),
  new_status VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  comment TEXT,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_progress_enquiry ON enquiry_progress(enquiry_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_progress_created_at ON enquiry_progress(created_at);

-- ========== FILE UPLOADS (for site photos, material samples, etc.) ==========
CREATE TABLE file_uploads (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  enquiry_id UUID REFERENCES enquiries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  quotation_id UUID REFERENCES quotations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  file_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  file_path VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  file_type VARCHAR(50), -- image, pdf, document
  file_size_bytes INT,
  uploaded_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_files_enquiry ON file_uploads(enquiry_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_files_quotation ON file_uploads(quotation_id);
```

### **Day 3-4: API Specifications Document**

```markdown name=API_SPECIFICATIONS.md
# Sales & Quotation API Specifications

## Base URL
```
http://localhost:5000/api
```

## Authentication
All endpoints (except `/auth/login`) require Bearer token in Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <JWT_TOKEN>
```

---

## 1. AUTHENTICATION ENDPOINTS

### 1.1 Login
**POST** `/auth/login`

**Request:**
```json
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "password": "securePassword123"
}
```

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "John Doe",
      "email": "john@example.com",
      "role": "ADMIN"
    },
    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
  }
}
```

**Error (401):**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Invalid email or password"
}
```

---

### 1.2 Logout
**POST** `/auth/logout`

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Logged out successfully"
}
```

---

### 1.3 Refresh Token
**POST** `/auth/refresh`

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "token": "new_jwt_token"
  }
}
```

---

## 2. ADMIN ENDPOINTS

### 2.1 Staff Management

#### 2.1.1 Create Staff
**POST** `/admin/staff`

**Request:**
```json
{
  "name": "Rajesh Kumar",
  "email": "rajesh@company.com",
  "phone": "9876543210",
  "password": "StaffPass123"
}
```

**Response (201):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "name": "Rajesh Kumar",
    "email": "rajesh@company.com",
    "phone": "9876543210",
    "role": "STAFF",
    "is_active": true,
    "created_at": "2026-03-04T10:30:00Z"
  }
}
```

---

#### 2.1.2 Get All Staff
**GET** `/admin/staff`

**Query Parameters:**
- `page`: 1 (optional)
- `limit`: 10 (optional)
- `search`: "name or email" (optional)
- `is_active`: true/false (optional)

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "staff": [
      {
        "id": "uuid",
        "name": "Rajesh Kumar",
        "email": "rajesh@company.com",
        "phone": "9876543210",
        "role": "STAFF",
        "is_active": true,
        "enquiry_count": 5,
        "created_at": "2026-03-04T10:30:00Z"
      }
    ],
    "pagination": {
      "page": 1,
      "limit": 10,
      "total": 25,
      "totalPages": 3
    }
  }
}
```

## Error Response Format

**All error responses follow this format:**

```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Error message",
  "code": "ERROR_CODE",
  "statusCode": 400
}
```

**Common Error Codes:**
- `INVALID_REQUEST`: Malformed request body
- `UNAUTHORIZED`: Missing or invalid token
- `FORBIDDEN`: User lacks permission
- `NOT_FOUND`: Resource not found
- `DUPLICATE_ENTRY`: Unique constraint violation
- `VALIDATION_ERROR`: Field validation failed
- `INTERNAL_ERROR`: Server error

---

## Rate Limiting
- 1000 requests per hour per API key
- Rate limit headers: `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Reset`

---

All list endpoints support pagination:
```json
{
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "total": 100,
    "totalPages": 10
  }
}

```typescript name=app.ts url=https://github.com/yourusername/sales-quotation-backend/blob/main/src/app.ts
import express, { Express, Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
import cors from 'cors';
import helmet from 'helmet';
import morgan from 'morgan';
import 'express-async-errors';
import dotenv from 'dotenv';

import authRoutes from './routes/auth.routes';
import adminRoutes from './routes/admin.routes';
import staffRoutes from './routes/staff.routes';
import enquiryRoutes from './routes/enquiry.routes';

import { authMiddleware } from './middleware/auth.middleware';
import { errorHandler } from './middleware/errorHandler';
import { validateEnv } from './config/environment';

dotenv.config();

// Validate environment variables
validateEnv();

const app: Express = express();
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;

// Middleware
app.use(helmet()); // Security headers
app.use(cors());   // CORS support
app.use(morgan('combined')); // Logging
app.use(express.json({ limit: '10mb' }));
app.use(express.urlencoded({ limit: '10mb', extended: true }));

// Health check route
app.get('/health', (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  res.json({ status: 'healthy', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() });
});

// Public routes
app.use('/api/auth', authRoutes);

// Protected routes
app.use('/api/admin', authMiddleware, adminRoutes);
app.use('/api/staff', authMiddleware, staffRoutes);
app.use('/api/enquiries', authMiddleware, enquiryRoutes);

// 404 handler
app.use((req: Request, res: Response) => {
  res.status(404).json({
    success: false,
    error: 'Route not found',
    code: 'NOT_FOUND',
    statusCode: 404,
  });
});

// Error handler (must be last)
app.use(errorHandler);

app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`✅ Server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);
  console.log(`📊 API Documentation: http://localhost:${PORT}/api-docs`);
});

export default app;
```

export const validateEnv = () => {
  const requiredEnvVars = [
    'NODE_ENV',
    'PORT',
    'DATABASE_URL',
    'JWT_SECRET',
    'JWT_EXPIRE',
    'FILE_UPLOAD_PATH',
  ];

  const missing = requiredEnvVars.filter(
    (envVar) => !process.env[envVar]
  );

  if (missing.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(
      `Missing required environment variables: ${missing.join(', ')}`
    );
  }
};

export const config = {
  nodeEnv: process.env.NODE_ENV || 'development',
  port: parseInt(process.env.PORT || '5000'),
  database: {
    url: process.env.DATABASE_URL,

  jwt: {
    secret: process.env.JWT_SECRET!,
    expiresIn: process.env.JWT_EXPIRE || '7d',
  },
  files: {
    uploadPath: process.env.FILE_UPLOAD_PATH || './uploads',
    maxFileSize: 10 * 1024 * 1024, // 10MB

};

import { Pool, QueryResult } from 'pg';
import { config } from './environment';

const pool = new Pool({
  connectionString: config.database.url,
  max: 20,
  idleTimeoutMillis: 30000,
  connectionTimeoutMillis: 2000,
});

export const query = async (
  text: string,
  params?: any[]
): Promise<QueryResult> => {
  const start = Date.now();
  try {
    const result = await pool.query(text, params);
    const duration = Date.now() - start;
    console.log('Executed query', { text, duration, rows: result.rowCount });
    return result;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Database query error:', error);
    throw error;
  }
};

export const getClient = async () => {
  return pool.connect();
};

export default pool;

#### **Backend: Authentication Middleware**

```typescript name=middleware/auth.middleware.ts url=https://github.com/yourusername/sales-quotation-backend/blob/main/src/middleware/auth.middleware.ts
import { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
import { config } from '../config/environment';

export interface AuthRequest extends Request {
  user?: {
    id: string;
    email: string;
    role: 'ADMIN' | 'STAFF';
  };
}

export const authMiddleware = (
  req: AuthRequest,
  res: Response,
  next: NextFunction
) => {
  const token = req.headers.authorization?.split(' ')[1];

  if (!token) {
    return res.status(401).json({
      success: false,
      error: 'No token provided',
      code: 'UNAUTHORIZED',
      statusCode: 401,
    });
  }

  try {
    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, config.jwt.secret) as {
      id: string;
      email: string;
      role: string;
    };
    req.user = decoded;
    next();
  } catch (error) {
    return res.status(401).json({
      success: false,
      error: 'Invalid token',
      code: 'UNAUTHORIZED',
      statusCode: 401,
    });
  }
};

export const requireRole = (roles: string[]) => {
  return (req: AuthRequest, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
    if (!req.user || !roles.includes(req.user.role)) {
      return res.status(403).json({
        success: false,
        error: 'Insufficient permissions',
        code: 'FORBIDDEN',
        statusCode: 403,
      });
    }
    next();
  };
};
```

```typescript name=middleware/errorHandler.ts
import { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';

interface AppError extends Error {
  statusCode?: number;
  code?: string;
}

export const errorHandler = (
  error: AppError,
  req: Request,
  res: Response,
  next: NextFunction
) => {
  const statusCode = error.statusCode || 500;
  const code = error.code || 'INTERNAL_ERROR';

  console.error('Error:', {
    message: error.message,
    code,
    statusCode,
    stack: error.stack,
  });

  res.status(statusCode).json({
    success: false,
    error: error.message || 'Internal server error',
    code,
    statusCode,
  });
};

```typescript name=services/AuthService.ts
import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
import { query } from '../config/database';
import { config } from '../config/environment';
import { User, CreateUserInput } from '../models/User';

export class AuthService {
  async registerUser(input: CreateUserInput): Promise<User> {
    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(input.password, 10);

    const result = await query(
      `INSERT INTO users (name, email, phone, password_hash, role)
       VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
       RETURNING id, name, email, phone, role, is_active, created_at`,
      [
        input.name,
        input.email,
        input.phone || null,
        passwordHash,
        input.role || 'STAFF',
      ]
    );

    return result.rows[0];
  }

  async loginUser(email: string, password: string): Promise<{
    user: User;
    token: string;
  }> {
    const result = await query(
      `SELECT id, name, email, phone, password_hash, role, is_active
       FROM users
       WHERE email = $1 AND is_deleted = FALSE`,
      [email]
    );

    if (result.rows.length === 0) {
      throw new Error('Invalid email or password');
    }

    const user = result.rows[0];

    if (!user.is_active) {
      throw new Error('User account is inactive');
    }

    const passwordMatch = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);
    if (!passwordMatch) {
      throw new Error('Invalid email or password');
    }

    const token = jwt.sign(
      { id: user.id, email: user.email, role: user.role },
      config.jwt.secret,
      { expiresIn: config.jwt.expiresIn }
    );

    // Remove password_hash from response
    delete user.password_hash;
    return { user, token };
  }

  async getUserById(id: string): Promise<User | null> {
    const result = await query(
      `SELECT id, name, email, phone, role, is_active, created_at, updated_at
       FROM users
       WHERE id = $1 AND is_deleted = FALSE`,
      [id]
    );

    return result.rows[0] || null;
  }
}

export default new AuthService();
```

import { Router, Request, Response } from 'express';
import AuthService from '../services/AuthService';

const router = Router();

// Login
router.post('/login', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const { email, password } = req.body;

    if (!email || !password) {
      return res.status(400).json({
        success: false,
        error: 'Email and password are required',
        code: 'INVALID_REQUEST',
        statusCode: 400,
      });
    }

    const { user, token } = await AuthService.loginUser(email, password);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      data: { user, token },
    });
  } catch (error: any) {
    res.status(401).json({
      success: false,
      error: error.message,
      code: 'UNAUTHORIZED',
      statusCode: 401,
    });
  }
});

// Logout
router.post('/logout', (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  res.json({
    success: true,
    message: 'Logged out successfully',
  });
});

export default router;

import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';
import '../models/user_model.dart';
import '../services/auth_service.dart';

class AuthProvider extends ChangeNotifier {
  User? _user;
  String? _token;
  bool _isLoading = false;
  String? _error;

  User? get user => _user;
  String? get token => _token;
  bool get isLoading => _isLoading;
  String? get error => _error;
  bool get isLoggedIn => _token != null;

  final AuthService _authService = AuthService();

  Future<bool> login(String email, String password) async {
    _isLoading = true;
    _error = null;
    notifyListeners();

    try {
      final result = await _authService.login(email, password);
      _user = result['user'];
      _token = result['token'];
      notifyListeners();
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      _error = e.toString();
      notifyListeners();
      return false;
    } finally {
      _isLoading = false;
      notifyListeners();
    }
  }

  Future<void> logout() async {
    _user = null;
    _token = null;
    notifyListeners();
  }
}

# Repository Code Search Guide

This ability provides comprehensive guidance for searching and navigating code in GitHub repositories. You have two powerful search tools available: **semantic-code-search** and **lexical-code-search**. Understanding when and how to use each is critical for effective code exploration.

## Available Search Tools

### semantic-code-search
**What it does:** Understands the meaning and context of your query to find conceptually relevant code.

**When to use:**
- User asks conceptual questions: "How does X work?", "Where is Y implemented?"
- Exploring unfamiliar codebases to understand architecture or features
- Finding code related to a specific functionality or concept
- No specific symbol names or file paths are known
- Need to understand patterns or approaches used in the codebase

**Key characteristics:**
- Query MUST be a complete sentence describing what you're looking for
- Returns code snippets ranked by semantic relevance
- Repository-scoped only (one repo at a time)

**Examples:**
| User question | Tool call |
|--------------|-----------|
| "How does authentication work in owner/repo?" | semantic-code-search: query="How does authentication work?", repoOwner="owner", repoName="repo" |
| "Where is rate limiting implemented?" | semantic-code-search: query="Where is rate limiting implemented?", repoOwner="owner", repoName="repo" |
| "How are database errors handled?" | semantic-code-search: query="How are database connection errors handled?", repoOwner="owner", repoName="repo" |

### lexical-code-search
**What it does:** Performs exact pattern matching using qualifiers to find specific code elements.

**When to use:**
- User mentions specific symbols, functions, or class names
- Looking for EXACT text matches (error messages, specific strings)
- Need to find files by path or name patterns
- Searching across multiple repositories or organizations
- User provides EXACT code snippets to find
- Following up on semantic search to find exact definitions

**Key qualifiers:**
| Qualifier | Purpose | Example |
|-----------|---------|---------|
| symbol: | Find function/class/method definitions | symbol:AuthService |
| content: | Match exact text in files | content:"error code 500" |
| path: | Match file paths (use regex) | path:/^src\\/utils\\/[^\\/]*helper[^\\/]*$/ |
| repo: | Scope to specific repository | repo:owner/name |
| org: | Scope to organization | org:github |
| language: | Filter by programming language | language:python |
| is: | Filter by properties | is:archived, is:fork, is:vendored, is:generated |

**Symbol construction:**

Use symbol: when users ask about function, class, or method definitions.

Common patterns:
| User asks | Interpretation | Tool call |
|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| "Where is class Helper defined in monalisa/net?" | Looking for class definition | query="symbol:Helper", scopingQuery="repo:monalisa/net" |
| "What functions are in Foo.go?" | Looking for symbols in file | query="symbol:Foo" |
| "Describe the method MyFunc" | Looking for method definition | query="symbol:MyFunc" |
| "Find AuthService class" | Looking for class definition | query="symbol:AuthService" |
| "Where is authenticate function?" | Looking for function definition | query="symbol:authenticate" |

**Boolean operators:** Use OR, NOT, AND to combine conditions
- Example: symbol:authenticate NOT is:archived

**Parameters:**
- query: The search query with qualifiers
- scopingQuery: (optional) Additional scoping like repo:, org:, path:, language:

**Constructing path queries:**

When users ask for files in specific directories or with certain names, construct regex paths.

Common patterns:
- Any file with "helper" anywhere: path:/.*helper[^\\/]*$/
- Specific directory, any file: path:/^src\\/utils\\/[^\\/]*$/
- File with extension: path:/.*\\.test\\.js$/

**Examples:**
| User question | Tool call |
|--------------|-----------|
| "Find the PaymentService class definition" | lexical-code-search: query="symbol:PaymentService" |
| "Show me all files with 'helper' in src/utils/" | lexical-code-search: query="path:/^src\\/utils\\/[^\\/]*helper[^\\/]*$/" |
| "Find error message 'connection timeout'" | lexical-code-search: query="content:\"connection timeout\"" |
| "Where is authenticate function in owner/repo?" | lexical-code-search: query="symbol:authenticate", scopingQuery="repo:owner/repo" |

## Example Workflows

### Example 1: Understanding a Feature
User: "How does payment processing work in owner/myapp?"

1. semantic-code-search: query="How does payment processing work?", repoOwner="owner", repoName="myapp"
   → Discovers: PaymentService, StripeClient, processPayment function
2. lexical-code-search: query="symbol:PaymentService", scopingQuery="repo:owner/myapp"
   → Finds exact class definition location
3. Read the file to understand implementation details

### Example 2: Finding Specific Code
User: "Where is the authenticate function defined?"

1. lexical-code-search: query="symbol:authenticate"
   → Finds exact definition immediately

### Example 3: Debugging from Error Message
User: "I'm seeing 'database connection timeout' error, where does this come from?"

1. lexical-code-search: query="content:\"database connection timeout\""
   → Finds where error message is defined
2. Read surrounding code for context

### Example 4: Exploring a Directory
User: "What helper utilities are in src/utils?"

1. lexical-code-search: query="path:/^src\\/utils\\/[^\\/]*helper[^\\/]*$/"
   → Lists all files with "helper" in that directory

## Remember

- **semantic-code-search** = Understanding concepts and architecture (requires full sentences, repoOwner, repoName)
- **lexical-code-search** = Finding exact symbols, patterns, and text (use qualifiers: symbol:, content:, path:)
- Use them together: semantic for exploration, lexical for precision

| **Framework** | .NET 8 (C#) | REST API, business logic, middleware |
| **Database** | MSSQL Server 2022 | Data persistence, relationships, transactions |
| **ORM** | Entity Framework Core 8 | Database abstraction, LINQ queries |
| **Architecture** | Clean Architecture (Repository Pattern) | Maintainability, testability |
| **API Documentation** | Swagger/OpenAPI | Interactive API docs |
| **Authentication** | JWT (Bearer Tokens) | Stateless auth, role-based access |
| **File Storage** | Azure Blob Storage OR Local File System | PDF quotations, site photos |
| **PDF Generation** | iTextSharp or QuestPdf | Dynamic PDF quotation generation |
| **Dependency Injection** | Built-in .NET DI Container | Service lifetime management |
| **Logging** | Serilog | Structured logging |

#### **Program.cs (Dependency Injection & Configuration)**

```csharp name=Program.cs url=https://github.com/yourusername/SalesQuotationAPI/blob/main/src/SalesQuotation.API/Program.cs
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens;
using Microsoft.OpenApi.Models;
using Serilog;
using System.Text;
using FluentValidation;
using SalesQuotation.Infrastructure.Data;
using SalesQuotation.Application.Services;
using SalesQuotation.Application.Validators;

var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);

// ========== LOGGING (Serilog) ==========
Log.Logger = new LoggerConfiguration()
    .MinimumLevel.Information()
    .WriteTo.Console()
    .WriteTo.File("logs/app-.txt", rollingInterval: RollingInterval.Day)
    .CreateLogger();

builder.Host.UseSerilog();

// ========== DATABASE ==========
builder.Services.AddDbContext<ApplicationDbContext>(options =>
    options.UseSqlServer(builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString("DefaultConnection"))
);

// ========== AUTHENTICATION (JWT) ==========
var jwtSettings = builder.Configuration.GetSection("JwtSettings");
var secretKey = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(jwtSettings["SecretKey"]!);

builder.Services.AddAuthentication(options =>
{
    options.DefaultAuthenticateScheme = JwtBearerDefaults.AuthenticationScheme;
    options.DefaultChallengeScheme = JwtBearerDefaults.AuthenticationScheme;
})
.AddJwtBearer(options =>
{
    options.TokenValidationParameters = new TokenValidationParameters
    {
        ValidateIssuerSigningKey = true,
        IssuerSigningKey = new SymmetricSecurityKey(secretKey),
        ValidateIssuer = false,
        ValidateAudience = false,
        ValidateLifetime = true,
        ClockSkew = TimeSpan.Zero
    };
});

// ========== SERVICES ==========
builder.Services.AddScoped<IAuthService, AuthService>();
builder.Services.AddScoped<IEnquiryService, EnquiryService>();
builder.Services.AddScoped<IQuotationService, QuotationService>();
builder.Services.AddScoped<IMeasurementService, MeasurementService>();
builder.Services.AddScoped<IPdfService, PdfService>();
builder.Services.AddScoped<IReportService, ReportService>();

// ========== REPOSITORIES ==========
builder.Services.AddScoped(typeof(IRepository<>), typeof(GenericRepository<>));
builder.Services.AddScoped<IUserRepository, UserRepository>();
builder.Services.AddScoped<IEnquiryRepository, EnquiryRepository>();
builder.Services.AddScoped<IQuotationRepository, QuotationRepository>();

// ========== VALIDATION ==========
builder.Services.AddValidatorsFromAssemblyContaining<CreateEnquiryValidator>();

// ========== AUTO MAPPER ==========
builder.Services.AddAutoMapper(AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies());

// ========== CONTROLLERS & CORS ==========
builder.Services.AddControllers();
builder.Services.AddCors(options =>
{
    options.AddPolicy("AllowAll", policy =>
    {
        policy.AllowAnyOrigin()
              .AllowAnyMethod()
              .AllowAnyHeader();
    });
});

// ========== SWAGGER ==========
builder.Services.AddSwaggerGen(c =>
{
    c.SwaggerDoc("v1", new OpenApiInfo
    {
        Title = "Sales & Quotation API",
        Version = "v1",
        Description = "REST API for field sales and quotation management"
    });

    c.AddSecurityDefinition("Bearer", new OpenApiSecurityScheme
    {
        In = ParameterLocation.Header,
        Description = "Please enter a valid token",
        Name = "Authorization",
        Type = SecuritySchemeType.Http,
        BearerFormat = "JWT",
        Scheme = "Bearer"
    });

    c.AddSecurityRequirement(new OpenApiSecurityRequirement
    {
        {
            new OpenApiSecurityScheme
            {
                Reference = new OpenApiReference
                {
                    Type = ReferenceType.SecurityScheme,
                    Id = "Bearer"
                }
            },
            new string[] { }
        }
    });
});

var app = builder.Build();

// ========== MIDDLEWARE ==========
if (app.Environment.IsDevelopment())
{
    app.UseSwagger();
    app.UseSwaggerUI(c =>
    {
        c.SwaggerEndpoint("/swagger/v1/swagger.json", "Sales & Quotation API v1");
    });
}

app.UseHttpsRedirection();
app.UseCors("AllowAll");
app.UseAuthentication();
app.UseAuthorization();
app.MapControllers();

// ========== DATABASE INITIALIZATION ==========
using (var scope = app.Services.CreateScope())
{
    var services = scope.ServiceProvider;
    var context = services.GetRequiredService<ApplicationDbContext>();
    context.Database.Migrate();
    
    // Seed initial data
    DbInitializer.Initialize(context);
}

app.Run();
```

#### **DbContext: ApplicationDbContext.cs**

```csharp name=ApplicationDbContext.cs url=https://github.com/yourusername/SalesQuotationAPI/blob/main/src/SalesQuotation.Infrastructure/Data/ApplicationDbContext.cs
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesQuotation.Domain.Entities;
using SalesQuotation.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesQuotation.Infrastructure.Data;

public class ApplicationDbContext : DbContext
{
    public ApplicationDbContext(DbContextOptions<ApplicationDbContext> options)
        : base(options)
    {
    }

    public DbSet<User> Users { get; set; }
    public DbSet<Material> Materials { get; set; }
    public DbSet<EnquiryStatusConfig> EnquiryStatusConfigs { get; set; }
    public DbSet<Enquiry> Enquiries { get; set; }
    public DbSet<MeasurementCategory> MeasurementCategories { get; set; }
    public DbSet<Measurement> Measurements { get; set; }
    public DbSet<Quotation> Quotations { get; set; }
    public DbSet<QuotationItem> QuotationItems { get; set; }
    public DbSet<EnquiryProgress> EnquiryProgress { get; set; }
    public DbSet<FileUpload> FileUploads { get; set; }

    protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
    {
        base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);

        // User configuration
        modelBuilder.Entity<User>(entity =>
        {
            entity.HasKey(e => e.Id);
            entity.Property(e => e.Email).IsRequired().HasMaxLength(255);
            entity.Property(e => e.Name).IsRequired().HasMaxLength(255);
            entity.HasIndex(e => e.Email).IsUnique();
        });

        // Enquiry configuration
        modelBuilder.Entity<Enquiry>(entity =>
        {
            entity.HasKey(e => e.Id);
            entity.Property(e => e.EnquiryNumber).IsRequired().HasMaxLength(50);
            entity.HasIndex(e => e.EnquiryNumber).IsUnique();
            entity.HasOne(e => e.CreatedBy).WithMany(u => u.CreatedEnquiries);
            entity.HasOne(e => e.AssignedStaff).WithMany(u => u.AssignedEnquiries);
        });

        // Quotation configuration
        modelBuilder.Entity<Quotation>(entity =>
        {
            entity.HasKey(e => e.Id);
            entity.Property(e => e.QuotationNumber).IsRequired().HasMaxLength(50);
            entity.HasIndex(e => e.QuotationNumber).IsUnique();
            entity.HasOne(e => e.Enquiry).WithMany(eq => eq.Quotations).OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
        });

        // Measurement configuration
        modelBuilder.Entity<Measurement>(entity =>
        {
            entity.HasKey(e => e.Id);
            entity.HasOne(e => e.Enquiry).WithMany(eq => eq.Measurements).OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
        });
    }
}
```

using SalesQuotation.Application.Dtos;

namespace SalesQuotation.Application.Services;

public interface IAuthService
{
    Task<(User user, string token)> LoginAsync(string email, string password);
    Task<User> RegisterAsync(CreateUserDto dto);
    Task<string> GenerateTokenAsync(User user);
}

public class AuthService : IAuthService
{
    private readonly ApplicationDbContext _context;
    private readonly IConfiguration _configuration;

    public AuthService(ApplicationDbContext context, IConfiguration configuration)
    {
        _context = context;
        _configuration = configuration;
    }

    public async Task<(User user, string token)> LoginAsync(string email, string password)
    {
        var user = await _context.Users.FirstOrDefaultAsync(u => u.Email == email && !u.IsDeleted);
        
        if (user == null || !VerifyPassword(password, user.PasswordHash))
            throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("Invalid email or password");

        if (!user.IsActive)
            throw new UnauthorizedAccessException("User account is inactive");

        var token = await GenerateTokenAsync(user);
        return (user, token);
    }

    public async Task<User> RegisterAsync(CreateUserDto dto)
    {
        var existingUser = await _context.Users.FirstOrDefaultAsync(u => u.Email == dto.Email);
        if (existingUser != null)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("Email already exists");

        var user = new User
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            Name = dto.Name,
            Email = dto.Email,
            Phone = dto.Phone,
            PasswordHash = HashPassword(dto.Password),
            Role = dto.Role,
            IsActive = true,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        };

        _context.Users.Add(user);
        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
        return user;
    }

    public async Task<string> GenerateTokenAsync(User user)
    {
        var jwtSettings = _configuration.GetSection("JwtSettings");
        var secretKey = new SymmetricSecurityKey(Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(jwtSettings["SecretKey"]!));
        var credentials = new SigningCredentials(secretKey, SecurityAlgorithms.HmacSha256);

        var claims = new[]
        {
            new System.Security.Claims.Claim("sub", user.Id.ToString()),
            new System.Security.Claims.Claim("email", user.Email),
            new System.Security.Claims.Claim("role", user.Role.ToString())
        };

        var token = new JwtSecurityToken(
            expires: DateTime.UtcNow.AddMinutes(int.Parse(jwtSettings["ExpiryMinutes"]!)),
            claims: claims,
            signingCredentials: credentials
        );

        return new JwtSecurityTokenHandler().WriteToken(token);
    }

    private string HashPassword(string password)
    {
        using (var sha256 = SHA256.Create())
        {
            var hashedBytes = sha256.ComputeHash(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(password));
            return Convert.ToBase64String(hashedBytes);
        }
    }

    private bool VerifyPassword(string password, string hash)
    {
        var hashOfInput = HashPassword(password);
        return hashOfInput == hash;
    }
}

using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesQuotation.Application.Dtos;
using SalesQuotation.Application.Services;

namespace SalesQuotation.API.Controllers;

[ApiController]
[Route("api/[controller]")]
public class AuthController : ControllerBase
{
    private readonly IAuthService _authService;
    private readonly ILogger<AuthController> _logger;

    public AuthController(IAuthService authService, ILogger<AuthController> logger)
    {
        _authService = authService;
        _logger = logger;
    }

    [HttpPost("login")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> Login([FromBody] LoginRequestDto request)
    {
        try
        {
            var (user, token) = await _authService.LoginAsync(request.Email, request.Password);
            
            var response = new
            {
                success = true,
                data = new
                {
                    user = new UserDto
                    {
                        Id = user.Id,
                        Name = user.Name,
                        Email = user.Email,
                        Phone = user.Phone,
                        Role = user.Role.ToString(),
                        IsActive = user.IsActive
                    },
                    token = token
                }
            };

            return Ok(response);
        }
        catch (UnauthorizedAccessException ex)
        {
            _logger.LogWarning($"Login failed: {ex.Message}");
            return Unauthorized(new { success = false, error = ex.Message, code = "UNAUTHORIZED", statusCode = 401 });
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _logger.LogError($"Login error: {ex.Message}");
            return StatusCode(500, new { success = false, error = "Internal server error", code = "INTERNAL_ERROR", statusCode = 500 });
        }
    }

    [HttpPost("logout")]
    public IActionResult Logout()
    {
        return Ok(new { success = true, message = "Logged out successfully" });
    }
}

import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';
import '../models/user_model.dart';
import '../services/api_service.dart';

class AuthProvider extends ChangeNotifier {
  User? _user;
  String? _token;
  bool _isLoading = false;
  String? _error;

  User? get user => _user;
  String? get token => _token;
  bool get isLoading => _isLoading;
  String? get error => _error;
  bool get isLoggedIn => _token != null && _user != null;

  final ApiService _apiService = ApiService();

  Future<bool> login(String email, String password) async {
    _isLoading = true;
    _error = null;
    notifyListeners();

    try {
      final response = await _apiService.post(
        '/auth/login',
        body: {
          'email': email,
          'password': password,
        },
      );

      if (response['success'] == true) {
        final userData = response['data']['user'];
        final token = response['data']['token'];

        _user = User.fromJson(userData);
        _token = token;

        // Save to local storage
        await _apiService.saveToken(token);

        notifyListeners();
        return true;
      } else {
        _error = response['error'] ?? 'Login failed';
        notifyListeners();
        return false;
      }
    } catch (e) {
      _error = e.toString();
      notifyListeners();
      return false;
    } finally {
      _isLoading = false;
      notifyListeners();
    }
  }

  Future<void> logout() async {
    _user = null;
    _token = null;
    await _apiService.clearToken();
    notifyListeners();
  }

  Future<bool> checkTokenValidity() async {
    final savedToken = await _apiService.getToken();
    if (savedToken != null) {
      _token = savedToken;
      // TODO: Validate token expiry
      notifyListeners();
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }
}

```dart name=lib/services/api_service.dart
import 'package:http/http.dart' as http;
import 'package:shared_preferences/shared_preferences.dart';
import 'dart:convert';

class ApiService {
  static const String baseUrl = 'http://192.168.1.100:5000/api'; // Update with your API URL

  Future<Map<String, dynamic>> post(
    String endpoint, {
    required Map<String, dynamic> body,
  }) async {
    final token = await getToken();
    final headers = {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      if (token != null) 'Authorization': 'Bearer $token',
    };

    try {
      final response = await http.post(
        Uri.parse('$baseUrl$endpoint'),
        headers: headers,
        body: jsonEncode(body),
      ).timeout(const Duration(seconds: 30));

      return jsonDecode(response.body);
    } catch (e) {
      return {
        'success': false,
        'error': 'Network error: $e',
      };
    }
  }

  Future<Map<String, dynamic>> get(String endpoint) async {
    final token = await getToken();
    final headers = {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      if (token != null) 'Authorization': 'Bearer $token',
    };

    try {
      final response = await http.get(
        Uri.parse('$baseUrl$endpoint'),
        headers: headers,
      ).timeout(const Duration(seconds: 30));

      return jsonDecode(response.body);
    } catch (e) {
      return {
        'success': false,
        'error': 'Network error: $e',
      };
    }
  }

  Future<String?> getToken() async {
    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
    return prefs.getString('jwt_token');
  }

  Future<void> saveToken(String token) async {
    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
    await prefs.setString('jwt_token', token);
  }

  Future<void> clearToken() async {
    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
    await prefs.remove('jwt_token');
  }
}

```csharp name=EnquiryService.cs
using AutoMapper;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesQuotation.Application.Dtos;
using SalesQuotation.Domain.Entities;
using SalesQuotation.Infrastructure.Data;

namespace SalesQuotation.Application.Services;

public class EnquiryService : IEnquiryService
{
    private readonly ApplicationDbContext _context;
    private readonly IMapper _mapper;

    public EnquiryService(ApplicationDbContext context, IMapper mapper)
    {
        _context = context;
        _mapper = mapper;
    }

    public async Task<IEnumerable<EnquiryDto>> GetAllEnquiriesAsync(int page = 1, int limit = 10, string? status = null)
    {
        var query = _context.Enquiries.Where(e => !e.IsDeleted).AsQueryable();

        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(status))
            query = query.Where(e => e.Status == status);

        var enquiries = await query
            .OrderByDescending(e => e.CreatedAt)
            .Skip((page - 1) * limit)
            .Take(limit)
            .Include(e => e.AssignedStaff)
            .Include(e => e.Measurements)
            .Include(e => e.Quotations)
            .ToListAsync();

        return _mapper.Map<IEnumerable<EnquiryDto>>(enquiries);
    }

    public async Task<EnquiryDto?> GetEnquiryByIdAsync(Guid id)
    {
        var enquiry = await _context.Enquiries
            .Include(e => e.AssignedStaff)
            .Include(e => e.Measurements)
            .Include(e => e.Quotations)
            .Include(e => e.ProgressHistory)
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(e => e.Id == id && !e.IsDeleted);

        return _mapper.Map<EnquiryDto>(enquiry);
    }

    public async Task<EnquiryDto> CreateEnquiryAsync(CreateEnquiryDto dto, Guid createdById)
    {
        var enquiryNumber = GenerateEnquiryNumber();

        var enquiry = new Enquiry
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            EnquiryNumber = enquiryNumber,
            CustomerName = dto.CustomerName,
            CustomerEmail = dto.CustomerEmail,
            CustomerPhone = dto.CustomerPhone,
            CustomerAddress = dto.CustomerAddress,
            Status = "INITIATED",
            Notes = dto.Notes,
            CreatedById = createdById,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        };

        _context.Enquiries.Add(enquiry);
        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();

        return _mapper.Map<EnquiryDto>(enquiry);
    }

    public async Task<EnquiryDto> UpdateEnquiryStatusAsync(Guid enquiryId, string newStatus, string? comment, Guid updatedById)
    {
        var enquiry = await _context.Enquiries.FirstOrDefaultAsync(e => e.Id == enquiryId && !e.IsDeleted);
        if (enquiry == null)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("Enquiry not found");

        var oldStatus = enquiry.Status;
        enquiry.Status = newStatus;
        enquiry.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

        // Log the status change
        var progress = new EnquiryProgress
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            EnquiryId = enquiryId,
            OldStatus = oldStatus,
            NewStatus = newStatus,
            Comment = comment,
            CreatedById = updatedById,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        };

        _context.EnquiryProgress.Add(progress);
        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();

        return await GetEnquiryByIdAsync(enquiryId);
    }

    public async Task<EnquiryDto> AssignEnquiryAsync(Guid enquiryId, Guid staffId, Guid assignedBy)
    {
        var enquiry = await _context.Enquiries.FirstOrDefaultAsync(e => e.Id == enquiryId && !e.IsDeleted);
        if (enquiry == null)
            throw new InvalidOperationException("Enquiry not found");

        enquiry.AssignedStaffId = staffId;
        enquiry.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
        
        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
        return await GetEnquiryByIdAsync(enquiryId);
    }

    public async Task<IEnumerable<EnquiryDto>> GetStaffEnquiriesAsync(Guid staffId, int page = 1, int limit = 10)
    {
        var enquiries = await _context.Enquiries
            .Where(e => e.AssignedStaffId == staffId && !e.IsDeleted)
            .OrderByDescending(e => e.CreatedAt)
            .Skip((page - 1) * limit)
            .Take(limit)
            .Include(e => e.Measurements)
            .Include(e => e.Quotations)
            .ToListAsync();

        return _mapper.Map<IEnumerable<EnquiryDto>>(enquiries);
    }

    private string GenerateEnquiryNumber()
    {
        var count = _context.Enquiries.Count() + 1;
        return $"ENQ-{DateTime.Now:yyyy}-{count:D4}";
    }
}

            CreatedById = createdById,

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();

-- ========== USERS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  phone VARCHAR(20),
  password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  role ENUM('ADMIN', 'STAFF') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'STAFF',
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  is_deleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  deleted_at TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT email_format CHECK (email ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}$')
);

CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users(email);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_role ON users(role);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_is_deleted ON users(is_deleted);

-- ========== MATERIALS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE materials (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  unit VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- "sq.ft", "meter", "piece", etc.
  base_cost DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_materials_name ON materials(name);
CREATE INDEX idx_materials_is_active ON materials(is_active);

-- ========== ENQUIRY STATUS CONFIG ==========
CREATE TABLE enquiry_status_config (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  status_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  status_value VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  display_order INT NOT NULL,
  color_hex VARCHAR(7),
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_status_is_active ON enquiry_status_config(is_active);

-- ========== ENQUIRIES TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE enquiries (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  enquiry_number VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  customer_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  customer_email VARCHAR(255),
  customer_phone VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  customer_address TEXT,
  assigned_staff_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  status VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INITIATED',
  notes TEXT,
  is_deleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  deleted_at TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (status) REFERENCES enquiry_status_config(status_value)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_number ON enquiries(enquiry_number);
CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_customer_phone ON enquiries(customer_phone);
CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_assigned_staff ON enquiries(assigned_staff_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_status ON enquiries(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_created_at ON enquiries(created_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_enquiries_is_deleted ON enquiries(is_deleted);

-- ========== MEASUREMENT CATEGORIES ==========
CREATE TABLE measurement_categories (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  category_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, -- "Flooring", "Wall Cladding", "Painting", etc.
  category_key VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  measurement_fields JSONB NOT NULL, -- {"length_unit": "meter", "breadth_unit": "meter", "output_unit": "sq.ft"}
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_categories_is_active ON measurement_categories(is_active);

-- ========== MEASUREMENTS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE measurements (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  enquiry_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES enquiries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  category_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES measurement_categories(id),
  measurement_data JSONB NOT NULL, -- {"length": 10, "breadth": 5, "calculated_area": 50}
  calculated_value DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_measurements_enquiry ON measurements(enquiry_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_measurements_category ON measurements(category_id);

-- ========== QUOTATIONS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE quotations (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  enquiry_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES enquiries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  quotation_number VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  quotation_date DATE NOT NULL,
  valid_until DATE,
  subtotal DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  tax_percentage DECIMAL(5, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  tax_amount DECIMAL(12, 2),
  total_amount DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', -- DRAFT, SENT, ACCEPTED, REJECTED
  pdf_path VARCHAR(500),
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  sent_at TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_quotations_enquiry ON quotations(enquiry_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_quotations_number ON quotations(quotation_number);
CREATE INDEX idx_quotations_status ON quotations(status);

-- ========== QUOTATION LINE ITEMS ==========
CREATE TABLE quotation_items (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  quotation_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES quotations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  material_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES materials(id),
  quantity DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  unit_cost DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  line_total DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_quotation_items_quotation ON quotation_items(quotation_id);

-- ========== ENQUIRY PROGRESS & COMMENTS ==========
CREATE TABLE enquiry_progress (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  enquiry_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES enquiries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  old_status VARCHAR(100),
  new_status VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  comment TEXT,
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_progress_enquiry ON enquiry_progress(enquiry_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_progress_created_at ON enquiry_progress(created_at);

-- ========== FILE UPLOADS (for site photos, material samples, etc.) ==========
CREATE TABLE file_uploads (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  enquiry_id UUID REFERENCES enquiries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  quotation_id UUID REFERENCES quotations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  file_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  file_path VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  file_type VARCHAR(50), -- image, pdf, document
  file_size_bytes INT,
  uploaded_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_files_enquiry ON file_uploads(enquiry_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_files_quotation ON file_uploads(quotation_id);

001_InitialSchema.sql.value:
-- Enable Identity Insert
SET IDENTITY_INSERT ON;

-- ========== USERS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE [Users] (
    [Id] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT NEWID(),
    [Name] NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    [Email] NVARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    [Phone] NVARCHAR(20),
    [PasswordHash] NVARCHAR(MAX) NOT NULL,
    [Role] NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK ([Role] IN ('ADMIN', 'STAFF')),
    [IsActive] BIT DEFAULT 1,
    [IsDeleted] BIT DEFAULT 0,
    [CreatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    [UpdatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    [DeletedAt] DATETIME NULL
);

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Users_Email] ON [Users]([Email]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Users_Role] ON [Users]([Role]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Users_IsDeleted] ON [Users]([IsDeleted]);

-- ========== MATERIALS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE [Materials] (
    [Id] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT NEWID(),
    [Name] NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    [Description] NVARCHAR(MAX),
    [Unit] NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    [BaseCost] DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
    [IsActive] BIT DEFAULT 1,
    [CreatedById] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    [UpdatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Materials_CreatedBy] FOREIGN KEY ([CreatedById]) REFERENCES [Users]([Id])
);

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Materials_Name] ON [Materials]([Name]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Materials_IsActive] ON [Materials]([IsActive]);

-- ========== ENQUIRY_STATUS_CONFIG TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE [EnquiryStatusConfigs] (
    [Id] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT NEWID(),
    [StatusName] NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    [StatusValue] NVARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    [DisplayOrder] INT NOT NULL,
    [ColorHex] NVARCHAR(7),
    [IsActive] BIT DEFAULT 1,
    [CreatedById] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    [UpdatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_StatusConfig_CreatedBy] FOREIGN KEY ([CreatedById]) REFERENCES [Users]([Id])
);

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_StatusConfig_IsActive] ON [EnquiryStatusConfigs]([IsActive]);

-- ========== ENQUIRIES TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE [Enquiries] (
    [Id] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT NEWID(),
    [EnquiryNumber] NVARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    [CustomerName] NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    [CustomerEmail] NVARCHAR(255),
    [CustomerPhone] NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    [CustomerAddress] NVARCHAR(MAX),
    [AssignedStaffId] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
    [Status] NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INITIATED',
    [Notes] NVARCHAR(MAX),
    [IsDeleted] BIT DEFAULT 0,
    [CreatedById] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    [UpdatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    [DeletedAt] DATETIME NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Enquiries_AssignedStaff] FOREIGN KEY ([AssignedStaffId]) REFERENCES [Users]([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Enquiries_CreatedBy] FOREIGN KEY ([CreatedById]) REFERENCES [Users]([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Enquiries_Status] FOREIGN KEY ([Status]) REFERENCES [EnquiryStatusConfigs]([StatusValue])
);

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Enquiries_Number] ON [Enquiries]([EnquiryNumber]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Enquiries_Phone] ON [Enquiries]([CustomerPhone]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Enquiries_AssignedStaff] ON [Enquiries]([AssignedStaffId]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Enquiries_Status] ON [Enquiries]([Status]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Enquiries_CreatedAt] ON [Enquiries]([CreatedAt]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Enquiries_IsDeleted] ON [Enquiries]([IsDeleted]);

-- ========== MEASUREMENT_CATEGORIES TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE [MeasurementCategories] (
    [Id] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT NEWID(),
    [CategoryName] NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    [CategoryKey] NVARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    [MeasurementFields] NVARCHAR(MAX) NOT NULL, -- JSON format
    [IsActive] BIT DEFAULT 1,
    [CreatedById] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    [UpdatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Categories_CreatedBy] FOREIGN KEY ([CreatedById]) REFERENCES [Users]([Id])
);

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Categories_IsActive] ON [MeasurementCategories]([IsActive]);

-- ========== MEASUREMENTS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE [Measurements] (
    [Id] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT NEWID(),
    [EnquiryId] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [CategoryId] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [MeasurementData] NVARCHAR(MAX) NOT NULL, -- JSON format
    [CalculatedValue] DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
    [Notes] NVARCHAR(MAX),
    [CreatedById] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    [UpdatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Measurements_Enquiry] FOREIGN KEY ([EnquiryId]) REFERENCES [Enquiries]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Measurements_Category] FOREIGN KEY ([CategoryId]) REFERENCES [MeasurementCategories]([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Measurements_CreatedBy] FOREIGN KEY ([CreatedById]) REFERENCES [Users]([Id])
);

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Measurements_Enquiry] ON [Measurements]([EnquiryId]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Measurements_Category] ON [Measurements]([CategoryId]);

-- ========== QUOTATIONS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE [Quotations] (
    [Id] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT NEWID(),
    [EnquiryId] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [QuotationNumber] NVARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    [QuotationDate] DATE NOT NULL,
    [ValidUntil] DATE,
    [Subtotal] DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
    [TaxPercentage] DECIMAL(5, 2) DEFAULT 0,
    [TaxAmount] DECIMAL(12, 2),
    [TotalAmount] DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
    [Notes] NVARCHAR(MAX),
    [Status] NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    [PdfPath] NVARCHAR(500),
    [CreatedById] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [SentAt] DATETIME,
    [CreatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    [UpdatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Quotations_Enquiry] FOREIGN KEY ([EnquiryId]) REFERENCES [Enquiries]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Quotations_CreatedBy] FOREIGN KEY ([CreatedById]) REFERENCES [Users]([Id])
);

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Quotations_Enquiry] ON [Quotations]([EnquiryId]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Quotations_Number] ON [Quotations]([QuotationNumber]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Quotations_Status] ON [Quotations]([Status]);

-- ========== QUOTATION_ITEMS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE [QuotationItems] (
    [Id] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT NEWID(),
    [QuotationId] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [MaterialId] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [Quantity] DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
    [UnitCost] DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
    [LineTotal] DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
    [Notes] NVARCHAR(MAX),
    [CreatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_QuotationItems_Quotation] FOREIGN KEY ([QuotationId]) REFERENCES [Quotations]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_QuotationItems_Material] FOREIGN KEY ([MaterialId]) REFERENCES [Materials]([Id])
);

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_QuotationItems_Quotation] ON [QuotationItems]([QuotationId]);

-- ========== ENQUIRY_PROGRESS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE [EnquiryProgress] (
    [Id] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT NEWID(),
    [EnquiryId] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [OldStatus] NVARCHAR(100),
    [NewStatus] NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    [Comment] NVARCHAR(MAX),
    [CreatedById] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Progress_Enquiry] FOREIGN KEY ([EnquiryId]) REFERENCES [Enquiries]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Progress_CreatedBy] FOREIGN KEY ([CreatedById]) REFERENCES [Users]([Id])
);

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Progress_Enquiry] ON [EnquiryProgress]([EnquiryId]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Progress_CreatedAt] ON [EnquiryProgress]([CreatedAt]);

-- ========== FILE_UPLOADS TABLE ==========
CREATE TABLE [FileUploads] (
    [Id] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT NEWID(),
    [EnquiryId] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
    [QuotationId] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
    [FileName] NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    [FilePath] NVARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    [FileType] NVARCHAR(50),
    [FileSizeBytes] INT,
    [UploadedById] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] DATETIME DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Files_Enquiry] FOREIGN KEY ([EnquiryId]) REFERENCES [Enquiries]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Files_Quotation] FOREIGN KEY ([QuotationId]) REFERENCES [Quotations]([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Files_UploadedBy] FOREIGN KEY ([UploadedById]) REFERENCES [Users]([Id])
);

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Files_Enquiry] ON [FileUploads]([EnquiryId]);
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Files_Quotation] ON [FileUploads]([QuotationId]);

# Sales & Quotation API

A comprehensive REST API for field sales and quotation management, built with .NET 8, Entity Framework Core, and MSSQL.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework:** .NET 8
- **Database:** MSSQL Server 2022
- **ORM:** Entity Framework Core 8
- **Authentication:** JWT Bearer
- **Documentation:** Swagger/OpenAPI
- **Logging:** Serilog
- **Validation:** FluentValidation

## Project Structure

```
SalesQuotationAPI/
├── SalesQuotation.Domain/          # Entities & Domain Models
├── SalesQuotation.Application/     # Business Logic & Services
├── SalesQuotation.Infrastructure/  # Data Access & External Services
├── SalesQuotation.API/             # REST API & Controllers
└── SalesQuotation.Tests/           # Unit & Integration Tests
```

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites

- .NET 8 SDK
- MSSQL Server 2022
- Visual Studio 2022 or VS Code

### Installation

1. **Clone the repository**

```bash
git clone https://github.com/bitwavee/sales-quotation-api.git
cd sales-quotation-api
```

2. **Restore NuGet packages**

```bash
dotnet restore
```

3. **Update appsettings**

Edit `SalesQuotation.API/appsettings.json` and update the connection string:

```json
"ConnectionStrings": {
  "DefaultConnection": "Server=YOUR_SERVER;Database=SalesQuotationDb;Trusted_Connection=True;Encrypt=False;"
}
```

4. **Run migrations**

```bash
dotnet ef database update --project SalesQuotation.Infrastructure --startup-project SalesQuotation.API
```

5. **Run the application**

```bash
cd SalesQuotation.API
dotnet run
```

The API will be available at `https://localhost:5001`

Swagger UI: `https://localhost:5001/swagger`

## API Endpoints

### Authentication
- `POST /api/auth/login` - Login and get JWT token
- `POST /api/auth/logout` - Logout

### Enquiries (Admin)
- `GET /api/enquiries` - Get all enquiries
- `GET /api/enquiries/{id}` - Get enquiry by ID
- `PUT /api/enquiries/{id}/assign` - Assign to staff member

### Enquiries (Staff)
- `POST /api/enquiries` - Create new enquiry
- `GET /api/enquiries/my-enquiries` - Get assigned enquiries
- `PUT /api/enquiries/{id}/status` - Update enquiry status

### Materials
- `GET /api/materials` - Get all materials
- `POST /api/materials` - Create material
- `PUT /api/materials/{id}` - Update material

### Quotations
- `POST /api/quotations` - Create quotation
- `GET /api/quotations/{id}` - Get quotation
- `POST /api/quotations/{id}/generate-pdf` - Generate PDF

### Measurements
- `POST /api/measurements` - Add measurement
- `GET /api/measurement-categories` - Get measurement categories
- `POST /api/measurements/calculate` - Calculate measurement value

## Database Schema

The database includes tables for:
- Users (Admin & Staff)
- Enquiries
- Materials
- Quotations & Quotation Items
- Measurements & Measurement Categories
- Enquiry Status Config
- Enquiry Progress Tracking
- File Uploads

## Authentication

All endpoints (except `/api/auth/login`) require a JWT token in the Authorization header:

```
Authorization: Bearer <your_jwt_token>
```

## Development

### Running Tests

```bash
dotnet test
```

### Code First Migrations

Create a new migration:

```bash
dotnet ef migrations add MigrationName --project SalesQuotation.Infrastructure --startup-project SalesQuotation.API
```

Update the database:

```bash
dotnet ef database update --project SalesQuotation.Infrastructure --startup-project SalesQuotation.API
```

## Configuration

### appsettings.json

```json
{
  "JwtSettings": {
    "SecretKey": "your-secret-key-min-32-chars",
    "ExpiryMinutes": 10080
  },
  "FileSettings": {
    "UploadPath": "wwwroot/uploads",
    "MaxFileSize": 10485760
  }
}
```

## Logging

Logs are written to:
- Console (Development)
- File: `logs/app-{date}.txt`
